reviews.review_description: I have been waiting for this game to drop forever my name is Lilbobvr in the discord ping me for a look around the game I am a beta tester and this game will NOT disappoint you. Even though there is no voice chat is gives a fun and entertaining game to play for free so why not download. Also monster= a meanie he eat me
I love playing your games NightMan and also I miss night runnerz but it's dead now :(
I love this game it’s community is insane it’s me bkbros but ye
